**Please share the profiles to career@qright.in**

Designation : AI Engineer / Developer

Education : B.E / B.Tech in AI related.

Experience : 5\+ years of relevant AI industry exp

Pay : upto 35 LPA

Location : Fully WFH

· **IMMEDIATE JOINERS only**

**The Opportunity**

To design, build and deploy agentic AI\-driven software systems that accelerate software development, automate workflows, and enhance productivity across business and technology teams for our client. The role will also coach and enable development teams across the organisation to adopt agentic coding practices, thereby improving engineering productivity, speed of delivery, and quality of technology solutions.

**Responsibility :**

1\. Agentic Development \& AI\-Driven Engineering

a. Design and develop agent\-based coding systems that autonomously generate, test, and optimise code.

b. Build AI agents capable of handling development tasks such as debugging, code review, documentation generation \& workflow automation.

c. Integrate LLMs and agent frameworks into development pipelines to enable AI\-assisted and autonomous coding workflows.

2\. Platform \& Tooling Development

a. Develop internal platforms and tools that enable teams to leverage agentic coding for faster software delivery.

b. Integrate AI agents with enterprise systems such as CRM, trading platforms, data platforms, and internal tools.

c. Build orchestration layers for multi\-agent systems managing complex workflows.

3\. Coaching, Adoption \& Capability Building

a. Coach and mentor developers across the organisation on agentic coding tools, frameworks, and best practices.

b. Drive organisation\-wide adoption of AI\-assisted development practices through workshops, playbooks, and hands\-on guidance.

c. Partner with engineering leaders to embed agentic coding into standard development workflows and SDLC processes.

d. Act as a centre of excellence resource for agentic development, helping teams solve complex coding \& automation challenges using AI agents.

4\. Development Productivity \& Automation

a. Improve developer productivity through AI\-driven development environments, code copilots, and automated testing frameworks.

b. Implement autonomous CI/CD capabilities including automated test generation, deployment validation, and performance optimisation.

c. Identify repetitive development tasks that can be automated using agentic systems.

5\. Collaboration \& Stakeholder Engagement

a. Work closely with Technology, Product, Data and Business teams to identify high\-impact automation opportunities.

b. Support teams in redesigning workflows to maximise AI\-enabled development productivity.

6\. Innovation \& Research

a. Track emerging trends in agentic AI, autonomous coding, and LLM\-based development frameworks.

b. Prototype and evaluate tools such as autonomous coding agents, multi\-agent orchestration frameworks \& AI\-native development platforms.

**Roles Requirements:**

1\. 5\+ years of AI industry experience with Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in AI related Engineering studies.

2\. Strong programming expertise in Python, Java, or TypeScript, with experience building scalable applications, microservices, and APIs.

3\. Hands\-on experience with LLM APIs and agent frameworks (e.g., LangChain, AutoGen, CrewAI, Semantic Kernel).

4\. Experience using AI\-assisted coding tools such as GitHub Copilot, Cursor, or Codeium to enhance development productivity.

5\. Solid understanding of software architecture, CI/CD pipelines, and DevOps practices in modern development environments.

6\. Experience building and integrating AI\-powered systems, including vector databases, RAG architectures, multi\-agent systems \& enterprise AI.

Pay: ₹3,000,000\.00 \- ₹3,500,000\.00 per year

Work Location: Remote

title: Senior Software Engineer - Model Training & AI Evals
description:
**Job Description**

**ABOUT THE ROLE**


We are looking for a Senior Engineer to join our AI team at the intersection of evaluation science, post\-training, and foundation model development. You will own our end\-to\-end eval and benchmarking infrastructure — the critical feedback loop that drives every major model improvement — while contributing hands\-on to post\-training pipelines for industry\-specific vertical foundation models.

  

This role is ideal for someone who has worked directly inside an LLM lab and understands what rigorous evaluation looks like at scale: designing the taxonomy of skills being measured, identifying failure modes, engineering synthetic data to close capability gaps, and translating eval signals into actionable training decisions.

 **WHAT YOU'LL DO**

**Evaluation \& Benchmarking**

* Design and own task\-level evaluation frameworks for LLM agents and base models, covering multi\-step reasoning, tool/API use, instruction following, and domain knowledge — grounded in real user failure modes rather than off\-the\-shelf benchmark suites.
* Build comparative benchmarking pipelines to assess leading frontier models (GPT\-4o, Gemini, Claude, Llama, Mistral, etc.) against each other and against internal models, with structured analysis of where each model family fails, regresses, or excels across subjects, topics, and task types.
* Produce capability gap reports that quantify performance deltas across dimensions such as subject\-matter accuracy, reasoning depth, factual consistency, and refusal behaviour.
* Track model version regressions across provider releases to maintain a living competitive intelligence benchmark.
* Develop domain\-specific benchmarks tailored to vertical use\-cases (e.g., STEM tutoring, legal, finance, healthcare) — including problem taxonomy design, rubric definition, and inter\-annotator agreement pipelines.
* Define and drive synthetic data generation strategies to systematically address model shortcomings in specific subjects, topics, and skill areas:
* Identify low\-performance clusters from eval results and translate them into targeted data generation prompts and pipelines.
* Design LLM\-assisted pipelines for generating high\-quality, diverse, and verifiable synthetic training and evaluation data at scale.
* Validate synthetic data quality through auto\-eval, human review, and downstream model performance lift experiments.
* Build automated regression suites integrated into CI/CD workflows to detect capability degradation across fine\-tuning runs and model updates.
* Partner with product, curriculum, and research teams to translate eval insights into prioritized post\-training and data flywheel decisions.

 **Post\-Training \& Fine\-Tuning**

* Lead or directly contribute to SFT, RLHF, RLAIF, and DPO training runs on industry\-specific vertical foundation models — from dataset design through training execution and eval\-gated release.
* Curate and engineer high\-quality instruction\-tuning and preference datasets for domain adaptation, with hands\-on experience distinguishing signal from noise in annotation pipelines.
* Define data quality criteria, rejection sampling strategies, and deduplication pipelines for SFT corpora.
* Design preference pair construction methodologies and reward model training setups grounded in domain\-specific quality rubrics.
* Implement and experiment with alignment techniques including reward modelling, process reward models (PRMs), and constitutional/RLAIF approaches.
* Run ablation studies and controlled experiments to attribute model behaviour changes to specific data or training interventions — not just report final numbers.
* Contribute to continual pre\-training and domain\-adaptive fine\-tuning pipelines for vertical models, including domain data sourcing, mixing strategies, and curriculum design.

**Infrastructure \& Tooling**

* Build scalable eval pipelines that run automatically on every training checkpoint and integrate into CI/CD for continuous model quality tracking.
* Maintain model cards, eval leaderboards, and internal dashboards providing visibility across experiments for both technical and non\-technical stakeholders.
* Ensure reproducibility through rigorous experiment tracking (W\&B, MLflow, or equivalent), versioned datasets, and documented training configs.

 **WHO YOU ARE**

**Required**

* 5\+ years of ML/AI engineering experience, with at least 2–3 years focused on large language models.
* **Lab pedigree:** Direct, hands\-on experience at an LLM lab, AI research organization, or equivalent frontier AI team — you have shipped models, not just called APIs.
* Familiarity with the full model lifecycle: pre\-training data, post\-training alignment, eval, and production deployment.
* Deep practical expertise in post\-training methods:
* SFT, RLHF, RLAIF, DPO, PPO — from dataset construction through training and eval\-gated release.
* Experience with reward modeling, preference data curation, and quality control for alignment pipelines.
* Demonstrated experience designing LLM evaluation frameworks beyond standard benchmarks — including task\-level evals for agentic or multi\-step workflows.
* Hands\-on experience building synthetic data generation pipelines to address specific model capability gaps:
* Designing targeted generation prompts based on eval failure analysis.
* Validating synthetic data quality through downstream model performance experiments.
* Proven track record of comparative benchmarking across leading foundation models, with structured analysis of capability shortcomings by subject, skill, or task type.
* Experience training or fine\-tuning vertical/industry\-specific foundation models — domain data curation, continual pre\-training, or domain\-adaptive SFT.
* Strong software engineering fundamentals: Python, PyTorch or JAX, distributed training

**Preferred**

* Publications or applied research contributions in LLM evaluation, alignment, or post\-training.
* Experience with multi\-modal models or agents with external tool/API use.
* Exposure to red\-teaming, adversarial evaluation, or safety benchmarking.
* Model distillation, speculative decoding, or inference optimization experience.
* Prior experience in an education, STEM, legal, biomedical, or enterprise software vertical.

 **WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE**

**30 Days**


Fully onboarded into training infra and eval repos. Running existing benchmarks end\-to\-end and producing a written gap analysis identifying missing coverage.

**60 Days**


Shipped at least one new domain\-specific benchmark and one synthetic data generation pipeline addressing a known model gap. CI\-integrated eval running on every checkpoint.

**3 Months**


Standardize model evaluation framework for foundation models. Own golden dataset strategies for fine\-tuning with measurable subject\-accuracy gains

**6 Months**


Recognized internally as the authority on model quality and competitive benchmarking. Eval insights are directly driving roadmap prioritization.

  

Why do we exist?


Students are working harder than ever before to stabilize their future. Our recent research study called State of the Student shows that nearly 3 out of 4 students are working to support themselves through college and 1 in 3 students feel pressure to spend more than they can afford. We founded our business on provided affordable textbook rental options to address these issues. Since then, we’ve expanded our offerings to supplement many facets of higher educational learning through Chegg Study, Chegg Math, Chegg Writing, Chegg Internships, Chegg Skills, and more to support students beyond their college experience. These offerings lower financial concerns for students by modernizing their learning experience. We exist so students everywhere have a smarter, faster, more affordable way to student.


  
### **About Us**

**What is Cheg****g?**
----------------------

 *An ‘always on’ digital learning platform.*

  

Chegg puts students first…Everything we build in this company is student\-focused, making us the leading student\-first connected learning platform. Chegg strives to improve the overall return on investment in education by helping students learn more in less time and at a lower cost. This is achieved by providing students a multitude of educational tools from affordable textbook rentals to Chegg Study which supplements their learning through 24/7 tutor access, step\-by\-step help with questions, and more.

  

Chegg is a publicly\-held company based in Santa Clara, California and trades on the NYSE under the symbol **CHGG**.

title: Staff Machine Learning Engineer (Employer of Record)
description:
Credit Acceptance is proud to be an award\-winning company with workplace recognition in multiple categories! Our world\-class culture is shaped by dedicated Team Members who share a drive to succeed as professionals and together as a company. A great product, amazing people and our stable financial history have made us one of the largest used car finance companies in the United States.  



  

In this role, you will work as a dedicated member of a globally distributed team, partnering closely with business partners in the U.S. to design, build, and scale solutions that directly impact our customers and operations. While your legal employer will be our EoR partner, you will be fully integrated into our Credit Acceptance team for day\-to\-day work and collaboration.


We are seeking a highly motivated and experienced Staff MLE within AI team. The ideal candidate will have a strong technical background in decision science, machine learning, and generative AI with a proven track record in solving business problems and implementing large\-scale automated solutions in partnership with the respective engineering teams. In this role, you will partner with business and engineering stakeholders to formulate the vision to achieve the company’s strategic goals and co\-lead the roadmap to deliver innovative solutions for dealers, consumers and team members. As a Staff, MLE at Credit Acceptance, you will play a pivotal role in the success of this mission as you would lead the development of AI\-powered solutions across different business areas. This involves understanding the business processes, identifying new opportunities to add value using ML/AI algorithms and harnessing data sources to build state\-of\-the\-art ML/AI solutions.  

  

**Outcomes and Activities:**

* ML Outcomes:
	+ Explore and apply advanced machine learning techniques, including not limited to large language models (LLMs), deep learning, and graph neural networks, to solve complex challenges across the organization.
	+ Collaborate with management and stakeholders to define strategic roadmaps and translate them into actionable quarterly plans.
	+ Drive execution and delivery of ML/AI solutions by managing priorities, deadlines, and deliverables, leveraging your technical expertise.
	+ Design and deliver scalable, secure systems using state\-of\-the\-art AI/ML technologies and industry best practices, and nurture the culture of creating high\-quality, well\-tested systems to address critical product and business needs.
		- Troubleshoot and resolve complex technical issues to improve system reliability, scalability, and operational efficiency.
		- Ensure the security, scalability, and architectural integrity of feature designs through reviews across teams.
		- Deliver hands\-on solutions while mentoring other data professionals (including MLEs) within the organization
	+ Guide a team of MLEs across different areas:
		- Mentoring: Mentor team members on design principles, coding standards, and the adoption of AI productivity tools.
		- Recommendations – Personalize guidance across different surfaces using deep learning methods; personalize layouts with Bayesian contextual multi\-armed bandits
		- Growth: Foster long\-term growth through data\-driven causality and incrementality
		- Gen\-AI: Power existing applications with Gen AI models and engineering to improve downstream experience and decisions
		- Lifecycle \- Using ML models (such as XGBoost \& Causal Meta\-Learner\-based model, etc), proactively guide business teams across different areas
		- Engineering \- With engineering partners, build ML and Gen\-AI platform and inference pipelines for different types of models
* Gen AI Outcomes:
	+ Architect and implement enterprise\-grade LLM\-powered solutions, managing the full lifecycle from business requirements to production deployment, monitoring, and continuous optimization
	+ Design and develop multi\-agent GenAI systems using state\-of\-the\-art frameworks (LangChain, LlamaIndex) to orchestrate complex workflows across retrieval augmentation, data operations, and compliance verification
	+ Engineer robust Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines incorporating advanced techniques such as hybrid retrieval, reranking, query expansion, and contextual compression
	+ Implement parameter\-efficient fine\-tuning strategies (LoRA, QLoRA, PEFT) to adapt foundation models to domain\-specific use cases while optimizing for inference costs and latency
	+ Develop intelligent routing and orchestration systems to manage conversation state across multiple specialized AI agents, ensuring seamless transitions between different system capabilities
	+ Build evaluation frameworks to measure and improve LLM performance across diverse metrics, including factuality, coherence, task completion, and alignment with business objectives
	+ Integrate LLM solutions with existing enterprise architecture, ensuring compliance with data security policies, authentication mechanisms, and transaction safety requirements

**Competencies:** The following items detail how you will be successful in this role.


* Customer Empathy: Customer Empathy is the ability to understand the perspectives, pain points, and experiences of customers. It involves actively putting oneself in the customer’s shoes, comprehending their needs and challenges, and using that understanding to provide a better, more customer\-centric experience.
* Engineering Excellence: Engineering Excellence is about bringing great craftsmanship and thought leadership to deliver an outstanding product that delights customers and solves for the business. This involves the pursuit and achievement of high standards, best practices, innovation, and superior solutions.
* One Team: A One Team mindset refers to a collaborative approach across the organization, where individuals work together seamlessly, without boundaries, as a single, cohesive team. Shared goals, open communication and mutual support create a sense of collective purpose. This enables teams to navigate challenges and pursue shared objectives more effectively.
* Owner’s Mindset: Owner’s Mindset involves adopting a set of behaviors that reflect a sense of responsibility, accountability, strategic thinking, and a proactive approach to managing your domain. As an owner, you understand the business and your domain(s) deeply and solve for the right outcome for the domain(s) and the business.

**Required:**

* PhD in Computer Science, Stats, Economics, or a relevant technical field with at least 5\+ years of relevant experience or MS with at least 8\+ years of experience in machine learning and software engineering
* ML Skills: 6\+ years of hands\-on experience designing, building and deploying AI (ML, DL, Gen\-AI) models, including Reinforcement Learning algorithms, Recommendation systems, Transformers, fine\-tuned LLMs, Causal Inference, Regressions, etc., with a solid understanding of mathematics, statistics, and engineering needed to build such infra
* GenAI Skills: 4\+ years of experience building and deploying AI/ML applications including Reinforcement algorithms, Recommendation systems, Generative AI etc. with solid understanding of mathematics, Computer Science, foundation concepts and engineering behind building AI applications and LLMs
* Strong problem\-solving skills with bias for action

**Preferred:**

* ML Preference:
	+ Experience in the automotive industry, especially in building ML/AI systems while ensuring local and central regulations
	+ Experience in model interpretability and responsible AI practices.
	+ Expertise in data science, advanced experimentation and visualization techniques.
	+ Experience in designing and implementing pipelines using DAGs (e.g., Kubeflow, DVC, Ray)
	+ Ability to construct batch and streaming microservices exposed as gRPC and/or GraphQL endpoints
	+ Experience with Databricks MLflow for ML lifecycle management and model versioning
	+ Hands\-on experience with Databricks Model Serving for production ML deployments
* GenAI Preference:
	+ Demonstrable experience in parameter\-efficient fine\-tuning, model quantization, and quantization\-aware fine\-tuning of LLM models
	+ Hands\-on knowledge of Chain\-of\-Thoughts, Tree\-of\-Thoughts, Graph\-of\-Thoughts prompting strategies
	+ Experience in designing and implementing pipelines using DAGs (e.g., Kubeflow, DVC, Ray)
	+ Ability to construct batch and streaming microservices exposed as gRPC and/or GraphQL endpoints
	+ Experience with Databricks MLflow for ML lifecycle management and model versioning
	+ Hands\-on experience with Databricks Model Serving for production ML deployments
	+ Knowledge of multimodal AI (text, image, audio integration)
	+ Proficiency with GenAI frameworks/tools and technologies such as Apache Airflow, Spark, Flink, Kafka/Kinesis, Snowflake, and Databricks.
		- Demonstrable experience in parameter\-efficient fine\-tuning, model quantization, and quantization\-aware fine\-tuning of LLM models
		- Hands\-on knowledge of Chain\-of\-Thoughts, Tree\-of\-Thoughts, Graph\-of\-Thoughts prompting strategies

**Knowledge and Skills:**

* ML Requirements:
	+ Hands\-on expertise in scaling and maintaining production\-grade ML services, with a strong focus on ML/LLM Operations (versioning, automation, observability, automated training and monitoring, etc.) and ability to balance ML model complexity with production requirements
	+ Passion for identifying new business opportunities and experience of using a test and learn approach to bring scalable and efficient solutions integrating AI algorithms, ML/LLM Ops, and s/w engineering
	+ Experience partnering with the engineering, product, business operations, legal and other teams while designing, building, and executing solutions
* Gen AI Requirements
	+ Proficiency with model training/inference frameworks (PyTorch, TensorFlow, Hugging Face Transformers)
	+ Experience building conversational AI (Text, Voice) , content generation, or code generation systems
	+ Hands\-on experience with building, fine\-tuning and deploying multi\-modal LLM Models and managing the end\-to\-end model lifecycle
	+ Experience partnering with engineering, product, BizOps and other data teams while designing, building and executing solutions
	+ Deep understanding in at least three of the following areas: data mining, advanced statistics, machine learning, deep learning (incl NLP)

**CTC Range:** ₹ 63,55,839 \- ₹ 93,21,897  



  

**Total Compensation (CTC):** Final CTC will be shared during the offer stage and will include all compensation components in detail as per EoR vendor's structure.


Final compensation within the range is influenced by many factors including role\-specific skills, depth and experience level, industry background, relevant education and certifications.


**This role is hired through an Employer of Record (EoR) partner in India.**

* You will be legally employed in India through our EoR partner
* While your legal employer is the EoR partner, you will work full\-time and be fully aligned to Credit Acceptance
* Your day\-to\-day work, responsibilities, and performance expectations will be consistent with our global team members
* You will receive locally compliant payroll, benefits, and statutory coverage through the EoR partner

**Our Company Values:**

To be successful in this role, Team Members need to be:


* Positive by maintaining resiliency and focusing on solutions.
* Respectful by collaborating and actively listening.
* Insightful by cultivating innovation, accumulating business and role specific knowledge, demonstrating self\-awareness and making quality decisions.
* Direct by effectively communicating and conveying courage.
* Earnest by taking accountability, applying feedback and effectively planning and priority setting.

**Expectations:**

* Regularly overlap with U.S. business hours to support collaboration with global team members.
* Remain compliant with our policies, processes and guidelines
* All other duties as assigned
* Attendance as required by department

title: ReactJS Developer - Immediate Joiner
description:
**Job Description: React Full Stack Developer**

**QuantumVeda – Education \& Spiritual Tech Division**

**POSITION OVERVIEW**

ParameterDetails

**Job Title**React Full Stack Developer

**Department** Education Technology \& Spiritual Technology

**Location** Mumbai (Remote/Hybrid Options Available)

**Employment Type** Full\-Time

**Experience** 3–8 Years

**Reporting To** Head of Product Development

**ROLE SUMMARY**

QuantumVeda is seeking a passionate and innovative **React Full Stack Developer** to lead the development of transformative web applications across our Education Tech and Spiritual Tech domains. You will be at the forefront of building platforms that revolutionize how millions of students prepare for competitive examinations (NEET, JEE, UPSC) and how spiritual seekers engage with meditation, wellness, and ancient wisdom through technology.

The role involves building production\-ready web applications, AI\-powered learning platforms, intelligent tutoring systems, and immersive spiritual experiences. You will take end\-to\-end ownership of both front\-end and back\-end systems, driving high\-quality development and delivering technical solutions across the entire product lifecycle.

**KEY RESPONSIBILITIES**

**1\. Front\-End Development (React Ecosystem)**

* **Build User\-Facing Interfaces**: Develop responsive, high\-performance web interfaces using React and TypeScript with clean, reusable components, state management (Zustand/Redux), forms/validation, and responsive UI
* **Modern Framework Implementation**: Set up and maintain modern frameworks (Next.js or Vite) with proper routing, server\-side rendering (SSR), and optimal performance
* **AI Avatar Integration**: Build interfaces for lifelike AI avatars that serve as virtual teachers, meditation guides, and spiritual mentors with real\-time interaction capabilities
* **Interactive Learning Experiences**: Develop interactive video players with quizzes, clickable annotations, and adaptive difficulty adjustments
* **Performance Optimization**: Ensure fast load times, smooth animations, and optimal Core Web Vitals across all devices

**2\. Back\-End Development (Node.js Ecosystem)**

* **API Development**: Design and implement RESTful APIs and microservices with Node.js, Express.js, and FastAPI, focusing on performance, security, and fault tolerance
* **Database Architecture**: Model data in PostgreSQL, implement caching with Redis, write efficient SQL, and maintain migrations and seed scripts
* **AI Integration**: Integrate with LLM APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic/Claude, Gemini, LLaMA) for content generation, tutoring, and personalized recommendations
* **Authentication \& Security**: Implement JWT/OAuth authentication, RBAC/permissions, input validation, rate limiting, and security hardening

**3\. Educational Technology Platforms**

* **Intelligent Tutoring Systems**: Build AI\-powered tutors that provide real\-time feedback, personalized hints, and adaptive learning paths for competitive exam preparation
* **Question Bank Management**: Develop systems for comprehensive, structured question banks for NEET, JEE, UPSC using AI\-driven content authoring tools
* **Automated Exam Content Generation**: Build algorithms that dynamically generate mock tests, practice papers, and personalized question sets based on student performance
* **Learning Analytics**: Implement machine learning models to analyze student performance data and predict outcomes for early intervention

**4\. Spiritual Technology Platforms**

* **Meditation \& Wellness Applications**: Build platforms for guided meditation, breathing exercises, and spiritual discourse delivery
* **Vedic Wisdom Digitization**: Create interfaces for digitized, translated, and interpreted ancient texts with NLP\-powered search
* **Personalized Spiritual Journeys**: Build recommendation engines for customized spiritual learning paths based on user profiles and progress
* **AI\-Generated Spiritual Content**: Develop systems for daily affirmations, meditation scripts, and inspirational messages

**5\. AI\-Powered Content Generation**

* **Automated Video Creation**: Build systems that transform text\-based content into engaging, narrated whiteboard\-style videos
* **Smart Question Generation**: Implement LLMs and NLP models for automatic question generation from topics, textbooks, or syllabus documents
* **Multilingual Content**: Create educational content systems in multiple Indian languages for inclusive learning
* **RAG Pipeline Implementation**: Build Retrieval\-Augmented Generation pipelines for accurate and contextual content retrieval from knowledge bases

**6\. Platform, Scale \& Delivery**

* **CI/CD \& DevOps**: Implement CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI) with automated testing, monitoring, and observability
* **Cloud Infrastructure**: Deploy scalable applications on AWS, Azure, or GCP with containerization (Docker)
* **Testing \& Quality Assurance**: Write unit/integration/E2E tests (Jest, React Testing Library, Playwright) and maintain code quality standards
* **Production Support**: Diagnose and resolve production issues, optimize database queries, and implement observability (logging, metrics, alerts)

**TECHNICAL SKILLS \& QUALIFICATIONSEssential Qualifications**CategoryRequirements**Education**Bachelor's or master's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field **Experience**3–8 years of experience in full stack development**Front\-End**React, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript (ES6\+), HTML5, CSS3, Tailwind CSS **State Management**Redux, Zustand, or Context API **Back\-End**Node.js, Express.js, Python (FastAPI/Django) **Databases**PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, SQL/NoSQL **API Development**RESTful APIs, GraphQL, Webhooks, API integration **Testing**Jest, React Testing Library, Playwright, pytest **CI/CD**GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins**Cloud**AWS, Azure, or GCP; Docker, Kubernetes **Version Control**Git, GitHub/GitLab **Preferred Qualifications**CategoryPreferences**EdTech Experience**Experience in developing AI solutions for education or e\-learning platforms **AI/ML Integration**Experience with LLM APIs, RAG pipelines, and AI\-powered features**Video/Avatar Tech**Knowledge of AI video generation, avatar creation, and speech synthesis tools**Spiritual/Wellness Domain**Familiarity with meditation, wellness, or spiritual content creation**Competitive Exams**Understanding of NEET, JEE, UPSC examination patterns**Multilingual**Experience with multilingual NLP and Indian languages**Portfolio**Shipped web applications and/or AI\-enabled apps showing end\-to\-end ownership

**SOFT SKILLS \& COMPETENCIES**

* **Innovative Mindset**: Ability to think creatively and propose novel web solutions for educational and spiritual challenges
* **Problem\-Solving**: Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills to tackle complex technical challenges
* **Collaboration**: Proven ability to work in cross\-functional teams and mentor junior engineers
* **Communication**: Excellent verbal and written communication skills to explain complex technical concepts to diverse audiences
* **Ownership**: Self\-motivated with the ability to take end\-to\-end ownership of features and products
* **Adaptability**: Willingness to learn and adapt to new technologies and domains
* **Ethical Tech**: Commitment to responsible AI principles, accessibility, and user privacy

**WHAT WE OFFER**

BenefitDetails

**Competitive Salary** Market\-aligned compensation package

**Growth Opportunities** Career development and leadership tracks

**Innovative Environment** Work on cutting\-edge AI and web technologies

**Flexible Work** Hybrid/remote work options with flexible hours

**Learning \& Development** Access to courses, conferences, and workshops

**Meaningful Impact** Contribute to education and spiritual well\-being of millions

**ABOUT QUANTUMVEDA**

QuantumVeda is a pioneering organization operating in two transformative domains :

**Education Tech**

* AI\-powered preparation for competitive examinations (NEET, JEE, UPSC)
* Personalized learning platforms and intelligent tutoring systems
* Automated content generation and video creation for all subjects
* Smart question banks and adaptive testing systems

**Spiritual Tech**

* AI\-driven meditation and wellness tools
* Digital transformation of ancient wisdom and spiritual practices
* Personalized spiritual guidance through AI avatars
* Vedic wisdom digitization and translation

**QuantumVeda** – *Where Quantum Science Meets Vedic Wisdom*

**HOW TO APPLY**

Interested candidates can send their resume and a brief cover letter to:

* **Email**: quantumveda99@gmail.com
* **Subject Line**: "Application for React Full Stack Developer – \[Your Name]"
* **Attach**: Resume, Portfolio (GitHub/Projects), and links to deployed applications

**QuantumVeda – Empowering Minds, Nurturing Souls**

Pay: ₹20,000\.00 \- ₹45,000\.00 per month

Work Location: Remote

title: AI Developer
description:
**About the Role** 

We are looking for a talented AI developer with at least 4 years of experience in designing, developing, and deploying AI\-powered applications. The ideal candidate should have hands\-on experience working with large language models (LLMs), generative AI, machine learning frameworks, and modern AI development tools to build intelligent solutions that solve real\-world business problems.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Design, develop, and deploy AI\-driven applications and workflows.
* Build and optimise Generative AI solutions using LLMs such as GPT, Claude, Gemini, or open\-source models.
* Develop Retrieval\-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines using vector databases.
* Create AI agents, chatbots, copilots, and automation workflows.
* Integrate AI models with web applications, APIs, and enterprise systems.
* Fine\-tune, evaluate, and monitor AI models for performance and accuracy.
* Collaborate with product managers, engineers, and stakeholders to translate business requirements into AI solutions.
* Ensure scalability, security, and reliability of AI systems in production.
* Stay updated with the latest advancements in AI, machine learning, and emerging technologies.

**Required Skills \& Qualifications**

* Minimum 4 years of experience working on AI/ML projects.
* Strong proficiency in Python.
* Experience with LLM frameworks such as LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex,
* Hands\-on experience building RAG applications.
* Familiarity with vector databases such as Pinecone, Weaviate, ChromaDB, FAISS, or Milvus.
* Experience working with OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Hugging Face, or similar AI platforms.
* Knowledge of prompt engineering, model evaluation, and AI optimisation techniques.
* Experience with REST APIs and backend development.
* Familiarity with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud.
* Understanding of software engineering best practices, Git, testing, and CI/CD pipelines.

**Preferred Qualifications**

* Experience developing AI agents and multi\-agent systems.
* Knowledge of MLOps tools and deployment practices.
* Experience with Docker, Kubernetes, and containerised environments.
* Exposure to fine\-tuning open\-source models.
* Understanding of NLP, embeddings, and semantic search concepts.

**About Client** 

Our client is a US\-based technology company that develops innovative AI\-powered solutions to help businesses automate workflows, improve decision\-making, and gain valuable insights from data. Leveraging technologies such as Generative AI, Large Language Models (LLMs), machine learning, and cloud computing, they build scalable, user\-focused products that solve real\-world business challenges while fostering a collaborative and innovation\-driven culture.

**About Aura**

At Aura Recruitment Solutions, we help talented technology professionals connect with exciting career opportunities at innovative companies worldwide. Whether your expertise is in engineering, product, data, AI, or other technology\-focused fields, we work to match you with organisations that value your skills and support your professional growth.

We believe that finding the right role goes beyond simply matching a resume to a job description: it’s about aligning opportunities with your career goals, interests, and long\-term aspirations.

By partnering with a diverse range of employers, from fast\-growing startups to established global enterprises, we provide access to meaningful roles where you can develop your career, contribute to impactful projects, and achieve your professional ambitions. Throughout the hiring journey, our team is committed to delivering a transparent, supportive, and candidate\-focused experience every step of the way.

Pay: ₹1,500,000\.00 \- ₹2,500,000\.00 per year

Benefits:

* Paid sick time
* Paid time off
* Work from home

Work Location: Remote

title: Principal Research Scientist & Professor of Practice (AI & Machine Learning)
description:
**Post Title: Principal Research Scientist \& Professor of Practice (AI \& Machine Learning)**  
**Work Mode: Fully Remote**

**Employment Type: Full\-time**  
**Pay:** ₹14\-20 LPA per annum (based on qualifications, experience, and interview performance)  
**Education:**  
**Doctorate (Ph.D.) – Required**

**Job description:**  
Schedule: Live cohorts from 05:00 IST \+ enterprise sessions  
About the role  
We’re hiring a PhD\-level educator–researcher to lead teaching and applied research in AI/ML across universities, high school researchers in north america, and enterprise upskilling. You’ll run large, high\-energy classes (often packed with software engineers), supervise research, publish, and ship real prototypes that matter.  
What you’ll do  
Teaching \& Mentorship

* Deliver clear, engaging classes on Python \+ core ML/AI (data prep, classical ML, intro deep learning, evaluation, deployment basics).
* Teachlarge mixed\-experience cohortswith strong classroom management.
* Run hands\-on labs (Jupyter/Colab), design assignments/quizzes, grade with rubrics, and host office hours/capstone mentoring.
* Lead early\-morning live sessions from 05:00 IST for global cohorts (remote).

Research \& Impact

* Lead applied AI/ML projects (e.g., CV, NLP/LLMs \& RAG, tabular ML, forecasting), publish in reputable venues, and open\-source code/data where possible.

Programme \& Community

* Co\-own curriculum roadmaps; keep examples industry\-relevant.
* Maintain teaching repos (notebooks, datasets, slides) and contribute to internal tooling.

Minimum requirements (must\-have)

* PhD in CS/AI/ML/Data Science/EE/Applied Math (or adjacent field).
* Willingness to work early hours (from 05:00 IST; remote acceptable for this slot).
* Excellent communication and strong classroom presence, especially with large groups of software engineers.
* Python fluency.
* Solid AI/ML foundations

Preferred (good\-to\-have)

* Deep\-learning experience (PyTorch or TensorFlow), plus one area: LLMs/RAG/agents, computer vision, time\-series.
* MLOps familiarity: versioning (Git/GitHub), experiment tracking (e.g., W\&B), packaging (Docker), simple APIs (FastAPI/Streamlit).
* A track record of publications / open\-source repos / datasets; prior student supervision (MTech/BTech/MSc) or corporate L\&D.
* Comfortable on Linux/cloud notebooks; basic SQL; data ethics/privacy awareness.

Success metrics

* Learner outcomes (attendance, completion, assessment deltas, CSAT/NPS).
* Research outputs (papers, code/data releases, demos/PoCs, grants/industry wins).
* On\-time delivery of labs, grading SLAs, and feedback quality.
* Evidence of classroom engagement and inclusion.

Compensation \& benefits

* Competitive CTC (India) commensurate with experience.
* conference support; professional development budget.

How to apply  
Apply on Indeed or send your CV to coordinator@pyxeda.ai with subject “**Principal Research Scientist** — \[Your Name]”.  
Job Type: Full\-time

Pay: ₹1,400,000\.00 \- ₹2,000,000\.00 per year

Education:

* Doctorate (Required)

Work Location: Remote

title: Automation Lead
description:
Role Purpose
  
This role is responsible fordesigning scalable, secure, and future‑ready automation solutions across the enterprise. This role acts as thetechnical authority for automation programs, ensuring alignment with business objectives, enterprise architecture, governance standards, and long‑term digital transformation goals.
  
The person will work closely withbusiness leaders, product teams, developers, and platform teams to translate complex requirements into robust automation and quality engineering architectures.
  
  

Key Responsibilities
  
Architecture Solution Design
  
  

* Defineend‑to‑end automation solution architecture encompassing:
* RPA
* Workflow automation (Power Platform)
* AI‑enabled / Agentic automation
* CreateHigh‑Level Designs (HLDs) and reviewLow‑Level Designs (LLDs) for automation initiatives
* Ensure solutions arescalable, reusable, secure, and compliant with enterprise standards


Automation Platform Strategy
  
  

* Own architecture standards for:
* Microsoft Power Platform (Power Apps, Power Automate, Power BI, Copilot)
* RPA tools (UiPath / PAD or equivalent)
* Evaluate and recommendtools, accelerators, frameworks, and AI capabilities for Automation CoE growth


Quality Engineering Test Architecture
  
  

* DefineQuality Engineering architecture including:
* Shift‑left testing
* Automation pyramid strategy
* Test data environment strategy
* CI/CD and DevOps integration
* Partner with QE leads to driveengineering‑led quality transformation


Governance Standards
  
  

* Establish and enforce:
* Automation architecture standards
* Design templates reference architectures
* Security, audit, and compliance frameworks
* Participate inarchitecture reviews, design sign‑offs, and CoE governance forums


Stakeholder Delivery Collaboration
  
  

* Translate business problems intoautomation‑first, technology‑agnostic solutions
* Act as thetechnical bridge between business, delivery, and platform teams
* Support pre‑sales, feasibility, and ROI discussions for large automation initiatives


Innovation Thought Leadership
  
  

* Drive adoption ofAI, Copilot, autonomous agents, and intelligent test generation
* Buildreusable assets, accelerators, and blueprints
* Mentor leads, and senior engineers within Automation CoE


Key Skills Competencies
  
Must‑Have Skills
  
  

* 7\+ years of experience insolution / technical architecture
* Strong expertise in:
* Enterprise automation workflow design
* RPA and low‑code platforms (Power Platform preferred)
* Experience designingenterprise‑scale, multi‑system automated solutions
* Strong understanding ofsecurity, compliance, and audit readiness


Good‑to‑Have
  
  

* Experience withAI/ML‑enabled automation
* Agentic AI, copilots, NLP‑based or decision automation
* Insurance / BFSI domain exposure
* Cloud architecture (Azure preferred)
* DevOps CI/CD pipeline integration


Core Competencies
  
  

* Architectural thinking problem solving
* Stakeholder management (CXO‑level exposure preferred)
* Strong design documentation communication skills
* Coaching technical leadership mindset
* Automation‑first, scalability‑driven approach


Key Deliverables Success Metrics
  
  

* Adoption of standardized automation architectures across programs
* Reduction in rework, design risks, and technical debt
* Increased automation reusability and platform stability
* Faster solution design\-to\-delivery cycle
* Audit‑ready, scalable automation ecosystem

title: ML Engineer
description:
**Role:** ML Engineer

**WM:** Remote

**Experience:** 5\+ years of experience with minimum 2 years of ML engineering experience

**Description**

**Position Overview:**

The Machine Learning Engineer at Workiva is responsible for contributing to the development and implementation of frameworks to evaluate and monitor innovative machine learning solutions. The role involves assisting in building platforms and metrics to evaluate and govern ML/GenAI\-based solutions, supporting the development of tools, systems, infrastructure, and automation to assess application performance and monitoring. The engineer will work closely with senior team members to troubleshoot issues related to accuracy, safety, and latency of ML\-based solutions. This position requires applying foundational knowledge in the Machine Learning space while collaborating with product teams, software architects, data architects, and product managers to deliver complete software solutions that address customer needs. The role also includes on\-call rotations for 24x7 support of Workiva's SaaS environments and active participation in an inclusive, collaborative team environment.

**Key Responsibilities:**

\* Assist in designing systems that enable rapid machine learning (ML) development, focusing on high availability and clear observability

\* Collaborate with product teams to develop APIs for accessing Workiva's Gen AI/Agentic AI solutions and the respective evaluation

\* Contribute to the delivery, update, and maintenance of ML infrastructure

\* Write and maintain high\-quality code, ensuring scalability, performance, and maintainability

\* Participate in code reviews, offering and receiving constructive feedback

\* Work closely with senior engineers to follow best practices and learn team processes

\* Write automated tests (unit, integration, functional) to ensure stability and accuracy

\* Debug and troubleshoot ML components across different services and applications

\* Engage with support teams in resolving production issues and ensuring smooth operation

\* Take part in on\-call rotations for 24x7 support of Workiva's SaaS environments

\* Collaborate with software and data architects, as well as product managers, to help deliver complete software solutions that address customer needs

\* Explore and experiment with new technologies and techniques to improve processes and products

\* Foster an inclusive and collaborative work environment, contributing to team creativity and growth

\* Gain hands\-on experience with Workiva's technical standards and methods, while taking ownership of assigned activities

**Required Skills:**

\* 5\+ years of experience with minimum 2 years of ML engineering experience, or an advanced degree

\* Proficiency in the machine learning development cycle, toolsets, and applying ML solutions to real\-world problems

\* Experience with model deployment, data pipelines, and CI/CD pipelines, as well as infrastructure management

\* Familiarity with Generative AI and relevant development patterns

\* Proficiency in Python and Java programming languages

\* Experience using source control systems (e.g., GitHub)

\* Experience in Machine Learning and LLM Evaluation metrics – RAGAS/DeepEval Framework

\* Research and implementation of Agentic AI Evaluation and respective metrics

\* Experience in developing and implementing frameworks for metrics evaluation and monitoring of ML/Gen AI/Agentic AI/AaaS\-based solutions

\* Strong foundation in programming, including data structures, algorithms, and distributed systems

\* Experience working in Agile/Sprint environments and debugging complex systems or applications

\* Knowledge of web protocols (HTTP), databases, performance tuning, and production\-level testing

\* Strong communication and organizational skills for managing multiple projects and meeting deliverables effectively

**Preferred (Bonus) Skills:**

\* Hands\-on experience with Docker and Kubernetes

\* Experience with cloud services like AWS or equivalent platforms

\* Knowledge of ISO42001 framework

\* Knowledge of Responsible AI standards, AI governance, and Audits

Pay: From ₹90,000\.00 per month

Work Location: Remote

title: AI/ML Engineer
description:
**Job Summary:**

We are seeking an AI/ML Engineer with hands\-on experience in Generative AI, Large Language Models (LLMs), LangChain, RAG Pipelines, and NLP. The ideal candidate should be passionate about building AI\-powered applications and leveraging cutting\-edge technologies to solve business challenges.

**Key Responsibilities:**

* Develop and deploy AI/ML and Generative AI solutions.
* Build and optimize RAG (Retrieval\-Augmented Generation) pipelines.
* Design AI applications using LangChain and LLM frameworks.
* Implement NLP models for text processing and analysis.
* Integrate AI models with web applications and APIs.
* Work with vector databases and embedding models.
* Perform prompt engineering and model optimization.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to deliver AI products.
* Research and evaluate emerging AI technologies and tools.

**Required Skills:**

* Strong proficiency in Python programming.
* Hands\-on experience with Generative AI (GenAI) applications and Large Language Models (LLMs).
* Experience building and deploying Retrieval\-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines.
* Working knowledge of LangChain, LangGraph, and AI orchestration frameworks.
* Strong understanding of Natural Language Processing (NLP) concepts and techniques.
* Experience with prompt engineering, model evaluation, and optimization.
* Familiarity with vector databases such as Pinecone, ChromaDB, FAISS, or Weaviate.
* Experience integrating AI models through REST APIs and backend services.
* Knowledge of machine learning algorithms, model training, and deployment workflows.
* Understanding of cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP.
* Strong problem\-solving, analytical, and debugging skills.

**Good to Have:**

* Experience with AI Agents and Agentic AI frameworks.
* Experience with FastAPI or Flask.

title: Senior Data Scientist (AWS ML & GenAI)
description:

**Job Title:** Senior Data Scientist  
**Experience:** 6–10 Years  
**Work Mode:** Remote  
**Contract Duration:** 6 Months  
**Shift Timing:** Early Shift (Start around 7:00–7:30 AM IST)  
**Employment Type:** Contract

Job Overview

We are seeking an experienced **Senior Data Scientist** to join our team on a 6\-month contract engagement. The ideal candidate will have strong expertise in **Machine Learning, Forecasting, Predictive Analytics, AWS SageMaker, and Amazon Bedrock**, with the ability to build scalable AI/ML solutions that drive business outcomes.

You will work closely with cross\-functional teams to design, develop, deploy, and optimize machine learning models for forecasting, customer analytics, demand prediction, and advanced business intelligence use cases. title: Senior Data Scientist
description:
**Senior Data Scientist**

**Company Description**

KinSure is an AI\-powered healthcare platform focused on helping individuals and families manage their health more effectively.

The company builds solutions for preventive care, family health management, digital health records, remote health monitoring, wearable health integration, and AI\-driven healthcare assistance.

By combining advanced technology with a patient\-centric approach, KinSure empowers people to make informed health decisions and improve overall well\-being.

The team is committed to creating a smarter, more connected healthcare ecosystem where families stay informed and supported throughout their healthcare journey.

**Role Description**

As a Senior Data Scientist at KinSure, you will design, develop, and deploy advanced data science and analytics solutions that power our healthcare platform.

You will work on end\-to\-end data science workflows including data collection, data exploration, feature engineering, statistical modeling, predictive analytics, machine learning model development, evaluation, and deployment.

You will collaborate with product, engineering, healthcare, and business stakeholders to transform healthcare data into actionable insights and intelligent solutions.

The role involves conducting research, leading analytical initiatives, mentoring junior team members, contributing to technical roadmaps, and ensuring that data\-driven systems are robust, secure, scalable, and aligned with healthcare standards.

This is a Full\-Time, Remote position.

**Experience Required**

* 10\+ years of experience in Data Science, Machine Learning, Statistics, Analytics, or related fields
* Proven experience building, deploying, and maintaining production\-grade data science solutions
* Experience leading data science projects and innovation initiatives
* Strong experience in predictive modeling, statistical analysis, and machine learning
* Experience mentoring Data Scientists, Analysts, and technical teams

**Key Responsibilities**

* Lead Data Science and Analytics initiatives
* Build predictive models and healthcare intelligence systems
* Analyze large\-scale healthcare, wearable, and biomedical datasets

* Develop data pipelines and analytical frameworks
* Generate actionable insights from structured and unstructured data
* Collaborate with product, engineering, and healthcare teams
* Mentor junior team members and provide technical leadership

* Ensure data quality, security, and compliance with healthcare standards

**Required Qualifications**

* Strong foundation in Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, and Data Science
* Expertise in Statistical Modeling, Hypothesis Testing, Experimental Design, and Data Analysis
* Strong understanding of Machine Learning, Predictive Analytics, and Time\-Series Analysis
* Demonstrated experience in research, analytics, and data\-driven problem solving
* Hands\-on experience with Python, SQL, and modern Data Science tools
* Strong communication and stakeholder management skills

**Technical Expertise**

The ideal candidate should possess strong expertise in:

* Data Science
* Machine Learning

* Python

* Power BI

**Preferred Qualifications**

* PhD in Data Science, Statistics, Computer Science, Mathematics, Biomedical Informatics, or related field

title: Staff Machine Learning Engineer (Employer of Record)
description:
Credit Acceptance is proud to be an award\-winning company with workplace recognition in multiple categories! Our world\-class culture is shaped by dedicated Team Members who share a drive to succeed as professionals and together as a company. A great product, amazing people and our stable financial history have made us one of the largest used car finance companies in the United States.  



  

In this role, you will work as a dedicated member of a globally distributed team, partnering closely with business partners in the U.S. to design, build, and scale solutions that directly impact our customers and operations. While your legal employer will be our EoR partner, you will be fully integrated into our Credit Acceptance team for day\-to\-day work and collaboration.


We are seeking a highly motivated and experienced Staff MLE within AI team. The ideal candidate will have a strong technical background in decision science, machine learning, and generative AI with a proven track record in solving business problems and implementing large\-scale automated solutions in partnership with the respective engineering teams. In this role, you will partner with business and engineering stakeholders to formulate the vision to achieve the company’s strategic goals and co\-lead the roadmap to deliver innovative solutions for dealers, consumers and team members. As a Staff, MLE at Credit Acceptance, you will play a pivotal role in the success of this mission as you would lead the development of AI\-powered solutions across different business areas. This involves understanding the business processes, identifying new opportunities to add value using ML/AI algorithms and harnessing data sources to build state\-of\-the\-art ML/AI solutions.  

  

**Outcomes and Activities:**

* ML Outcomes:
	+ Explore and apply advanced machine learning techniques, including not limited to large language models (LLMs), deep learning, and graph neural networks, to solve complex challenges across the organization.
	+ Collaborate with management and stakeholders to define strategic roadmaps and translate them into actionable quarterly plans.
	+ Drive execution and delivery of ML/AI solutions by managing priorities, deadlines, and deliverables, leveraging your technical expertise.
	+ Design and deliver scalable, secure systems using state\-of\-the\-art AI/ML technologies and industry best practices, and nurture the culture of creating high\-quality, well\-tested systems to address critical product and business needs.
		- Troubleshoot and resolve complex technical issues to improve system reliability, scalability, and operational efficiency.
		- Ensure the security, scalability, and architectural integrity of feature designs through reviews across teams.
		- Deliver hands\-on solutions while mentoring other data professionals (including MLEs) within the organization
	+ Guide a team of MLEs across different areas:
		- Mentoring: Mentor team members on design principles, coding standards, and the adoption of AI productivity tools.
		- Recommendations – Personalize guidance across different surfaces using deep learning methods; personalize layouts with Bayesian contextual multi\-armed bandits
		- Growth: Foster long\-term growth through data\-driven causality and incrementality
		- Gen\-AI: Power existing applications with Gen AI models and engineering to improve downstream experience and decisions
		- Lifecycle \- Using ML models (such as XGBoost \& Causal Meta\-Learner\-based model, etc), proactively guide business teams across different areas
		- Engineering \- With engineering partners, build ML and Gen\-AI platform and inference pipelines for different types of models
* Gen AI Outcomes:
	+ Architect and implement enterprise\-grade LLM\-powered solutions, managing the full lifecycle from business requirements to production deployment, monitoring, and continuous optimization
	+ Design and develop multi\-agent GenAI systems using state\-of\-the\-art frameworks (LangChain, LlamaIndex) to orchestrate complex workflows across retrieval augmentation, data operations, and compliance verification
	+ Engineer robust Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines incorporating advanced techniques such as hybrid retrieval, reranking, query expansion, and contextual compression
	+ Implement parameter\-efficient fine\-tuning strategies (LoRA, QLoRA, PEFT) to adapt foundation models to domain\-specific use cases while optimizing for inference costs and latency
	+ Develop intelligent routing and orchestration systems to manage conversation state across multiple specialized AI agents, ensuring seamless transitions between different system capabilities
	+ Build evaluation frameworks to measure and improve LLM performance across diverse metrics, including factuality, coherence, task completion, and alignment with business objectives
	+ Integrate LLM solutions with existing enterprise architecture, ensuring compliance with data security policies, authentication mechanisms, and transaction safety requirements

**Competencies:** The following items detail how you will be successful in this role.


* Customer Empathy: Customer Empathy is the ability to understand the perspectives, pain points, and experiences of customers. It involves actively putting oneself in the customer’s shoes, comprehending their needs and challenges, and using that understanding to provide a better, more customer\-centric experience.
* Engineering Excellence: Engineering Excellence is about bringing great craftsmanship and thought leadership to deliver an outstanding product that delights customers and solves for the business. This involves the pursuit and achievement of high standards, best practices, innovation, and superior solutions.
* One Team: A One Team mindset refers to a collaborative approach across the organization, where individuals work together seamlessly, without boundaries, as a single, cohesive team. Shared goals, open communication and mutual support create a sense of collective purpose. This enables teams to navigate challenges and pursue shared objectives more effectively.
* Owner’s Mindset: Owner’s Mindset involves adopting a set of behaviors that reflect a sense of responsibility, accountability, strategic thinking, and a proactive approach to managing your domain. As an owner, you understand the business and your domain(s) deeply and solve for the right outcome for the domain(s) and the business.

**Required:**

* PhD in Computer Science, Stats, Economics, or a relevant technical field with at least 5\+ years of relevant experience or MS with at least 8\+ years of experience in machine learning and software engineering
* ML Skills: 6\+ years of hands\-on experience designing, building and deploying AI (ML, DL, Gen\-AI) models, including Reinforcement Learning algorithms, Recommendation systems, Transformers, fine\-tuned LLMs, Causal Inference, Regressions, etc., with a solid understanding of mathematics, statistics, and engineering needed to build such infra
* GenAI Skills: 4\+ years of experience building and deploying AI/ML applications including Reinforcement algorithms, Recommendation systems, Generative AI etc. with solid understanding of mathematics, Computer Science, foundation concepts and engineering behind building AI applications and LLMs
* Strong problem\-solving skills with bias for action

**Preferred:**

* ML Preference:
	+ Experience in the automotive industry, especially in building ML/AI systems while ensuring local and central regulations
	+ Experience in model interpretability and responsible AI practices.
	+ Expertise in data science, advanced experimentation and visualization techniques.
	+ Experience in designing and implementing pipelines using DAGs (e.g., Kubeflow, DVC, Ray)
	+ Ability to construct batch and streaming microservices exposed as gRPC and/or GraphQL endpoints
	+ Experience with Databricks MLflow for ML lifecycle management and model versioning
	+ Hands\-on experience with Databricks Model Serving for production ML deployments
* GenAI Preference:
	+ Demonstrable experience in parameter\-efficient fine\-tuning, model quantization, and quantization\-aware fine\-tuning of LLM models
	+ Hands\-on knowledge of Chain\-of\-Thoughts, Tree\-of\-Thoughts, Graph\-of\-Thoughts prompting strategies
	+ Experience in designing and implementing pipelines using DAGs (e.g., Kubeflow, DVC, Ray)
	+ Ability to construct batch and streaming microservices exposed as gRPC and/or GraphQL endpoints
	+ Experience with Databricks MLflow for ML lifecycle management and model versioning
	+ Hands\-on experience with Databricks Model Serving for production ML deployments
	+ Knowledge of multimodal AI (text, image, audio integration)
	+ Proficiency with GenAI frameworks/tools and technologies such as Apache Airflow, Spark, Flink, Kafka/Kinesis, Snowflake, and Databricks.
		- Demonstrable experience in parameter\-efficient fine\-tuning, model quantization, and quantization\-aware fine\-tuning of LLM models
		- Hands\-on knowledge of Chain\-of\-Thoughts, Tree\-of\-Thoughts, Graph\-of\-Thoughts prompting strategies

**Knowledge and Skills:**

* ML Requirements:
	+ Hands\-on expertise in scaling and maintaining production\-grade ML services, with a strong focus on ML/LLM Operations (versioning, automation, observability, automated training and monitoring, etc.) and ability to balance ML model complexity with production requirements
	+ Passion for identifying new business opportunities and experience of using a test and learn approach to bring scalable and efficient solutions integrating AI algorithms, ML/LLM Ops, and s/w engineering
	+ Experience partnering with the engineering, product, business operations, legal and other teams while designing, building, and executing solutions
* Gen AI Requirements
	+ Proficiency with model training/inference frameworks (PyTorch, TensorFlow, Hugging Face Transformers)
	+ Experience building conversational AI (Text, Voice) , content generation, or code generation systems
	+ Hands\-on experience with building, fine\-tuning and deploying multi\-modal LLM Models and managing the end\-to\-end model lifecycle
	+ Experience partnering with engineering, product, BizOps and other data teams while designing, building and executing solutions
	+ Deep understanding in at least three of the following areas: data mining, advanced statistics, machine learning, deep learning (incl NLP)

**CTC Range:** ₹ 63,55,839 \- ₹ 93,21,897  



  

**Total Compensation (CTC):** Final CTC will be shared during the offer stage and will include all compensation components in detail as per EoR vendor's structure.


Final compensation within the range is influenced by many factors including role\-specific skills, depth and experience level, industry background, relevant education and certifications.


**This role is hired through an Employer of Record (EoR) partner in India.**

* You will be legally employed in India through our EoR partner
* While your legal employer is the EoR partner, you will work full\-time and be fully aligned to Credit Acceptance
* Your day\-to\-day work, responsibilities, and performance expectations will be consistent with our global team members
* You will receive locally compliant payroll, benefits, and statutory coverage through the EoR partner

**Our Company Values:**

To be successful in this role, Team Members need to be:


* Positive by maintaining resiliency and focusing on solutions.
* Respectful by collaborating and actively listening.
* Insightful by cultivating innovation, accumulating business and role specific knowledge, demonstrating self\-awareness and making quality decisions.
* Direct by effectively communicating and conveying courage.
* Earnest by taking accountability, applying feedback and effectively planning and priority setting.

**Expectations:**

* Regularly overlap with U.S. business hours to support collaboration with global team members.
* Remain compliant with our policies, processes and guidelines
* All other duties as assigned

title: Enterprise Data Engineer | SQL, Python, Cloud Platforms & Data Migration Support
description:
About the job

**Job Summary**

We are seeking an experienced Data Migration and Data Engineering Specialist supporting large\-scale data transformation projects. This role involves leveraging advanced SQL development and Python scripting to support data migration, data warehousing, and enterprise analytics initiatives. The ideal candidate will design and execute complex data pipelines, support cloud\-based data environments, and apply AI integration techniques to enhance operational efficiency and data quality.**Software Requirements***Required Software Proficiency:*

* SQL (Snowflake, SQL Server) — advanced skills in designing, developing, and optimizing queries supporting data migration and warehousing (supporting 10\+ years)
* Python (latest version, e.g., Python 3\.8\+) — extensive experience scripting, automating data workflows, and supporting data transformation projects (supporting 10\+ years)
* Data warehousing technologies supporting scalable data storage and data lakes in Snowflake or SQL Server (support supporting 10\+ years)
* Data migration tools: supporting complex data conversions, migration validation, and reconciliation support

*Preferred Software Skills:*

* Cloud platform support: AWS, Azure, or GCP — supporting data platform migration and cloud\-native data management (preferred)
* ETL \& Data Pipelines: Talend, Informatica, or similar supporting large enterprise data integration support

**Overall Responsibilities**

* Design, develop, and optimize scalable data pipelines supporting enterprise data migration, analytics, and compliance needs
* Support data validation, reconciliation, and cleansing activities, ensuring integrity during migration processes
* Collaborate with data architects, scientists, and business stakeholders to translate business needs into robust data solutions supporting operational and analytical objectives
* Support cloud\-based data environments, including migration support, schema evolution, and data platform setup
* Automate data workflows supporting data load, transformation, and validation operations supporting continuous delivery
* Monitor data pipeline performance, troubleshoot failures, and optimize for performance and data quality
* Develop and maintain comprehensive documentation for data integrations, schemas, migration processes, and operational workflows
* Support ongoing data quality initiatives, data governance, and compliance in line with enterprise standards

**Technical Skills (By Category)**

* Languages \& Data Tools (Essential):
* SQL (Snowflake, SQL Server): data validation, migration, and query optimization support
* Python: scripting, automation of data workflows, transformation support
* Databases \& Data Management:
* Relational databases: SQL Server, Snowflake supporting enterprise data warehouses and data lakes
* Data validation, reconciliation, and schema design supporting data quality and compliance
* Cloud \& Infrastructure:
* AWS, Azure, or GCP (supporting cloud migration and hybrid architecture) (preferred)
* Data Integration \& Migration:

title: AI Product Head/Partner
description:
**AI \& Web Data Product Head / Partner (WFH)**

**Experience:** 7 to 15 Years  
**Location:** Remote  
**Mode of Engagement:** Full\-time / Consultant  
**No. of Positions:** 1 to 2  
**Educational Qualifications:** Degree or Master’s in Computer Science, Data Science, Engineering, or a related technical/business field.  
**Technical Expertise:** LLMs for Structured Data Extraction, Web Scraping (Scrapy, Playwright), Regex, NLP, Data Pipelines, Python, SQL, Snowflake, AWS, GCP.  
**Industry:** AI / DATA / IT\-ITES / Web Data Acquisition \& Extraction  
**Notice Period:** Immediate Joiners Preferred

**What We’re Looking For**

* Proven experience in product management with a strong focus on automated web data extraction, large\-scale scraping frameworks, and unstructured web\-to\-structured data pipelines.
* **Experience in taking high\-volume web data ingestion or parsing products to market with proven commercial success, ideally with a product valuation ranging between $2M and $25M.**
* **Product technical expert with a proven track record of IP\-ing and commercializing at least one proprietary web extraction engine, parsing tool, or AI/ML data product.**
* **Demonstrated hands\-on experience managing the full product lifecycle—from handling complex website architectures and dynamic content to successful scaling.**
* **Strong technical expertise in web scraping architectures, proxy management, anti\-bot bypassing, and cloud data warehouses (AWS, GCP, Snowflake).**
* **Deep business acumen with exposure to monetizing data, API\-as\-a\-product GTM strategies, and stakeholder management.**
* **Exceptional communication skills with the ability to translate complex web scraping, parsing accuracy, and data quality metrics into clear business value.**

**Responsibilities**

* Define and articulate the strategic vision for Web Data Extraction and Processing products, aligned with organizational goals and evolving enterprise data demands.
* **Conduct market research, user research, and competitive analysis to identify technology gaps and opportunities for web automation.**
* **Develop and maintain comprehensive product roadmaps, balancing extraction accuracy, delivery success rates, customer needs, and business value.**
* **Lead the end\-to\-end product lifecycle and team—from concept, data labeling, development, and launch to GTM execution and scaling.**
* **Ensure all product releases meet functional, technical, compliance, and performance standards while maintaining high parsing accuracy.**
* **Collaborate with engineering teams to design scalable data pipelines, resilient scraping networks, and LLM\-powered extraction frameworks.**
* **Own and execute GTM strategies, including API positioning, developer documentation, and customer feedback loops.**
* **Drive commercial success through P\&L ownership, ROI analysis, and product valuation growth.**
* **Manage cross\-functional stakeholders and foster collaboration across engineering, sales, marketing, and leadership teams.**
* **Stay ahead of emerging AI/ML parsing frameworks, synthetic data generation, and cloud scraping innovations.**

**Qualifications**

* Hands\-on expertise in AI\-powered Web Data Extraction, including Generative AI for data structuring, DOM\-aware extraction, NLP\-based entity recognition, and large\-scale web scraping.
* **Proven ability to IP and launch commercially successful automated web data products that remain actively used by enterprise customers.**
* **Proficiency in Agile/Scrum methodologies and project management tools such as Jira and Confluence.**
* **Hands\-on experience with Python, SQL, data orchestration tools, and data validation frameworks.**
* **Product Management certifications (Pragmatic, AIPMM, SAFe) are an added advantage.**
* **Strong leadership, stakeholder management, and the ability to bridge technical and business teams effectively.**

title: Principal Research Scientist & Professor of Practice (AI & Machine Learning)
description:
**Post Title: Principal Research Scientist \& Professor of Practice (AI \& Machine Learning)**  
**Work Mode: Fully Remote**

**Employment Type: Full\-time**  
**Pay:** ₹14\-20 LPA per annum (based on qualifications, experience, and interview performance)  
**Education:**  
**Doctorate (Ph.D.) – Required**

**Job description:**  
Schedule: Live cohorts from 05:00 IST \+ enterprise sessions  
About the role  
We’re hiring a PhD\-level educator–researcher to lead teaching and applied research in AI/ML across universities, high school researchers in north america, and enterprise upskilling. You’ll run large, high\-energy classes (often packed with software engineers), supervise research, publish, and ship real prototypes that matter.  
What you’ll do  
Teaching \& Mentorship

* Deliver clear, engaging classes on Python \+ core ML/AI (data prep, classical ML, intro deep learning, evaluation, deployment basics).
* Teachlarge mixed\-experience cohortswith strong classroom management.
* Run hands\-on labs (Jupyter/Colab), design assignments/quizzes, grade with rubrics, and host office hours/capstone mentoring.
* Lead early\-morning live sessions from 05:00 IST for global cohorts (remote).

Research \& Impact

* Lead applied AI/ML projects (e.g., CV, NLP/LLMs \& RAG, tabular ML, forecasting), publish in reputable venues, and open\-source code/data where possible.

Programme \& Community

* Co\-own curriculum roadmaps; keep examples industry\-relevant.
* Maintain teaching repos (notebooks, datasets, slides) and contribute to internal tooling.

Minimum requirements (must\-have)

* PhD in CS/AI/ML/Data Science/EE/Applied Math (or adjacent field).
* Willingness to work early hours (from 05:00 IST; remote acceptable for this slot).
* Excellent communication and strong classroom presence, especially with large groups of software engineers.
* Python fluency.
* Solid AI/ML foundations

Preferred (good\-to\-have)

* Deep\-learning experience (PyTorch or TensorFlow), plus one area: LLMs/RAG/agents, computer vision, time\-series.
* MLOps familiarity: versioning (Git/GitHub), experiment tracking (e.g., W\&B), packaging (Docker), simple APIs (FastAPI/Streamlit).
* A track record of publications / open\-source repos / datasets; prior student supervision (MTech/BTech/MSc) or corporate L\&D.
* Comfortable on Linux/cloud notebooks; basic SQL; data ethics/privacy awareness.

Success metrics

* Learner outcomes (attendance, completion, assessment deltas, CSAT/NPS).
* Research outputs (papers, code/data releases, demos/PoCs, grants/industry wins).
* On\-time delivery of labs, grading SLAs, and feedback quality.
* Evidence of classroom engagement and inclusion.

Compensation \& benefits

* Competitive CTC (India) commensurate with experience.
* conference support; professional development budget.

How to apply  
Apply on Indeed or send your CV to coordinator@pyxeda.ai with subject “**Principal Research Scientist** — \[Your Name]”.  
Job Type: Full\-time

Pay: ₹1,400,000\.00 \- ₹2,000,000\.00 per year

Education:

* Doctorate (Required)

Work Location: Remote

title: AI/ML Engineer
description:
Hands\-on experience in document intelligence and extraction

Production experience with Azure Document Intelligence — not just familiarity, but someone who has used it at scale and knows its limitations

Real table extraction experience from complex documents — merged cells, borderless tables, multi\-column layouts — using tools like Camelot, tabula, or equivalent, in a live system, not a prototype

Custom ML model training for document parsing — layout classifiers, field extractors, or document understanding transformers (Donut, LayoutLM, or equivalent) taken through to production

A working evaluation methodology — ground truth datasets, per\-field precision and recall, systematic quality measurement. Candidates who measure extraction quality only by manual spot\-checking are not suitable.

Experience with engineering, industrial, or technical documents — test reports, datasheets, inspection records — rather than purely financial or healthcare documents

Strong Python engineering — not notebook\-level, but production pipeline code with structured logging, error handling, and job queues

The documents we are processing are complex — multi\-thousand\-page engineering reports, inconsistent layouts, handwritten annotations, multi\-column tables. We need someone who has faced genuinely hard extraction problems and solved them, not someone who has let cloud tools handle the easy cases.
